title: Better noteblock
body:
**what it does:**

the default noteblock texure dosent give much info about what note is it in and other noteblock texurepack I've used often make it look ugly so I decided to make one trying to maintain the best balance it could at showing the information of what note the noteblock is at without having to make it look non-minecrafty or ugly in my opinion.

**note:**

1. the map used in the screenshot is a prison called mangrove eye by avatardotpng, yatsu, corealis etc if yiu wsnt to learn more about it check out ots yotube video by clicking the link https://youtu.be/qvOTdZyEiWc?si=ylwqoBoCGGLioKPY or searching mangrove eye and watching avatardotpng video on it

2. if any noteblock texurepack has a texure identical or similar to it its mostly a coinincidence.**
